operational_knowledge_units.title: Bits model fields for tags requiring bit conversion
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Bits Model is used for tags that have bits that need to be converted. The slide defines the meaning of BitType, Bit, Value, and DefaultValue within this model.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Sorter Sweeper Database / Bits Model'
Text: 'For Tags that have bits that need to be converted.'
Text: 'Bit: defines the bit to look for'
Text: 'Value: shows if its currently a 0 (NULL) or a 1.'
Text: 'DefaultValue: is used for tags we write to the tipper to reset the state.'

relationships.target: Tags that have bits that need to be converted
state reset for tags written to the tipper

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper Database Bits Model reference. Used for tags with bits that need conversion. BitType defines function. Bit defines which bit to look for. Value indicates current state as 0 (NULL) or 1. DefaultValue is used for tags written to the tipper to reset state.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Bits model value and default value behavior
operational_knowledge_units.summary: Within the Bits Model, the Value field represents the current bit state as 0 (NULL) or 1, while DefaultValue is used when writing tags to the tipper in order to reset state.
observed_evidence: Text: 'Value: shows if its currently a 0 (NULL) or a 1.'
Text: 'DefaultValue: is used for tags we write to the tipper to reset the state.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Bits Model behavior: Value shows current bit state, either 0 (NULL) or 1. DefaultValue is used when writing tags to the tipper to reset the state.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: No explicit procedure on Bits Model slide

procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide presents field definitions for the Bits Model and mentions state reset behavior for tags written to the tipper; no numbered or sequential actions are shown.
warnings: The slide defines database fields and behavior but does not provide an explicit action sequence.
Do not infer configuration or write procedures from this slide alone.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Discarded as a procedure candidate because slide 98 is a database model reference. It describes BitType, Bit, Value, and DefaultValue and mentions resetting state when writing tags to the tipper, but it does not provide explicit operational steps.
